articles.description: The Windows Insider Program is streamlining the number of preview channels available, and scrapping its A/B testing system to streamline feature rollouts.
articles.content: Microsoft is giving the Windows 11 preview program its biggest reset in years, and the goal is simple: make testing Windows features less confusing. In its latest announcement, the company is introdu… [+5772 chars]
